name: The Star Entertainment Group Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 48% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1020, stop A$0.0940, target A$0.1150 (1.64:1) — then trail it.
